title: ochna afzelii
intro: Ochna afzelii, also known as the bird's egg tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Ochnaceae. Traditionally, Ochna afzelii has been used in West African medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Ochna afzelii include the treatment of fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, as well as its use as an anti-diarrheal agent. Ochna afzelii is often prepared as a herbal decoction or infusion, and its leaves and roots are used in various traditional medicine practices.
